title: Cosmos Glitch Poster — live glitch-art (故障艺术) treatment + drop-your-own-image
title_vi: Cosmos Glitch Poster — xử lý glitch-art trực tiếp (tách màu RGB, xé lát, scanline) + thả ảnh của bạn
summary: A live glitch-art (故障艺术) treatment in code: RGB channel split (chromatic aberration), horizontal slice-displacement bursts, scanlines, VHS roll, datamosh blocks and burst noise. Ships with a procedural cyberpunk poster, OR drop / upload your own image and it glitches that; save the frame as PNG. Canvas 2D (chosen over WebGL for reliability). Offline, reduced-motion aware.
usage_notes: RUN: open index.html. TECHNIQUES: channel-isolated R/G/B canvases recombined with offsets ('lighter'); per-band slice roll; block copy/datamosh; scanline pattern; intensity envelope with bursts + pointer energy. INTERACTION: move/tap=intensify; ↻ Glitch=burst; ▲ Image or drag-drop=use your own; ▼ Save=PNG. NOTE: this is the glitch EFFECT, not an image generator — feed it a subject. TUNE: CFG (chromaMax, sliceMax, scan, aspect).
summary_vi: Lớp xử lý glitch-art (故障艺术) bằng code: tách kênh màu RGB, xé lát ngang, scanline, VHS roll, datamosh. Có sẵn poster cyberpunk procedural, HOẶC thả/upload ảnh bất kỳ để glitch ảnh đó; lưu PNG. Canvas 2D (chọn thay WebGL cho chắc). Offline.
notes: Reference-recreation (Ra) from Alex's IMG_4689 (故障艺术 glitch art). repo cosmos-akashic-effects/web-templates/fx/glitch-poster/.
